title: PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — TrustSec Segmentation Enforcement Evidence
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with PCI 1.4.5 tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 requires functional CDE segmentation. UC-17.1.36 and UC-17.1.76 evidence both runtime SXP/SGT health and policy-matrix stability.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that CDE segmentation enforcement (TrustSec SXP / SGT bindings on switches and the GBP matrix in ISE) is operating without drift.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.11.108' archiving SXP-flap and SGT-mismatch events plus baseline-drift events to `audit_evidence` with `pcidss_clause=1.4.5`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Disable SXP peer to a CDE NAD. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: All SXP healthy. Empty result; control attested.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (87060, 87061, 87062) earliest=-1d
| stats count by sxp_peer, MessageCode
| eval pcidss_clause="1.4.5", control="CDE_Segmentation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — CDE segmentation enforcement via TrustSec SXP/SGT health.
value: Runtime SXP failures or SGT mismatches break CDE segmentation invisibly. Daily evidence to audit_evidence ensures the QSA can confirm segmentation was continuously operating, not just configured.
implementation: Daily. Coordinate with UC-17.1.36 and UC-17.1.76 deployment.
visualization: PCI 1.4.5 panel: SXP-peer health gauge; SGT mismatch table; GBP drift count.

references.title: UC-17.1.36 — TrustSec / SGT Mismatch and SXP Listener Health

knownFalsePositives: 1. Brief SXP peer flaps during scheduled NAD reboots.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.36 + UC-17.1.76 operational.
- `audit_evidence` with 1y+ retention.

## Step 1 — Data

Via Cisco ISE add-on.

## Step 2 — Implementation

```ini
[UC-22.11.108: PCI 1.4.5 — Segmentation Enforcement Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.11.108,reg=PCIDSS,clause=1.4.5
```

## Step 3 — Validate

Deliberately drop an SXP peer; confirm evidence captured.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

PCI 1.4.5 dashboard.

## Step 5 — Audit

Quarterly evidence pack with QSA review.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — CDE segmentation enforcement via TrustSec SXP/SGT health. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
